rationale: No direct conflict. §45.059 governs the bond-default payment mechanism and does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values. Increasing the homestead exemption may indirectly pressure school district finances but does not alter this statute's operative terms.
quote: the commissioner shall instruct the comptroller to transfer from the appropriate account in the permanent school fund to the district's paying agent the amount necessary to pay the maturing or matured principal or interest.
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure on school districts possible but no statutory conflict with §45.059 operative text.
